plan.title: Plan - Quality Visibility Workflow Repair
plan.objective: Restore failing quality-visibility workflow checks for both frontend and backend by reproducing failures locally, applying minimal fixes, and validating the same commands pass.
in_scope: Reproduce quality-visibility failures locally for frontend and backend paths.
Concrete failing commands and error output tied to workflow steps.
Patch workflow or source issues causing failures.
Minimal code/config updates that resolve failing steps.
Verify frontend and backend quality-visibility checks pass and preflight is clean.
Passing verification evidence for impacted commands and policy gates.
out_of_scope: No broad refactors or unrelated cleanup; only changes required to make frontend/backend quality visibility checks pass reliably.

tasks.summary: Reproduce failing frontend/backend quality-visibility commands locally.
acceptance_criteria: Command output identifies concrete failure sources.
tasks.outcome: Captured frontend quality-visibility lint failures tied to strict ESLint rules in orchestrator policy and component tests. | Captured backend quality-visibility coverage instability under high parallel workers and identified worker-count throttling as mitigation.
evidence: verify: cd frontend && NPM_CONFIG_CACHE=/tmp/soundspan-frontend-npm-cache npm run lint
verify: cd backend && NPM_CONFIG_CACHE=/tmp/soundspan-backend-npm-cache npm run test:coverage -- --maxWorkers=2 src/services/__tests__/notificationPolicyService.test.ts

tasks.summary: Apply minimal fixes for discovered frontend/backend failure roots.
acceptance_criteria: Previously failing commands pass after patching.
tasks.outcome: Patched workflow to isolate npm cache and cap backend coverage workers for better memory stability. | Fixed frontend lint-breaking patterns in orchestrator policy and component test files. | Updated OpenAPI coverage tooling to normalize regex route params and ignore Express router.all for implemented-route coverage matching.

tasks.summary: Run final impacted checks and preflight.
acceptance_criteria: All targeted checks pass and preflight remains clean.
tasks.outcome: Regenerated and verified JSDoc and OpenAPI coverage artifacts at 100%. | Validated frontend quality path (lint + build) and backend targeted coverage path without full-suite rerun.
evidence: verify: cd frontend && NPM_CONFIG_CACHE=/tmp/soundspan-frontend-npm-cache npm run lint
verify: cd frontend && NPM_CONFIG_CACHE=/tmp/soundspan-frontend-npm-cache npm run build
verify: cd backend && NPM_CONFIG_CACHE=/tmp/soundspan-backend-npm-cache npm run test:coverage -- --maxWorkers=2 src/services/__tests__/notificationPolicyService.test.ts

pre_spec_outline.purpose_goals: Restore failing quality-visibility workflow checks for both frontend and backend by reproducing failures locally, applying minimal fixes, and validating the same commands pass.
pre_spec_outline.non_goals: No broad refactors or unrelated cleanup; only changes required to make frontend/backend quality visibility checks pass reliably.

spec_outline.summary: Identify failing frontend and backend quality-visibility steps, map failures to specific scripts/files, patch root causes with minimal scope, and verify workflow parity locally.

full_spec_outline.objective: Reproduce quality-visibility failures locally for frontend and backend paths.
full_spec_outline.deliverable: Concrete failing commands and error output tied to workflow steps.
acceptance_criteria: Both failing surfaces are reproduced with actionable diagnostics.

full_spec_outline.objective: Patch workflow or source issues causing failures.
full_spec_outline.deliverable: Minimal code/config updates that resolve failing steps.
acceptance_criteria: Patched commands succeed in local verification.

full_spec_outline.objective: Verify frontend and backend quality-visibility checks pass and preflight is clean.
full_spec_outline.deliverable: Passing verification evidence for impacted commands and policy gates.

refined_spec.summary: Use workflow-parity command reproduction first, then fix only root-cause files/commands that fail, and avoid touching unrelated repo drift.

full_refined_spec.decision: Reproduce the exact quality-visibility commands before editing.
full_refined_spec.rationale: Avoid speculative fixes and ensure changes are tied to current failures.
acceptance_criteria: Each code change maps to an observed failing command.

full_refined_spec.decision: Keep patches limited to workflow-related frontend/backend failure points.
full_refined_spec.rationale: User requested repair of workflow failures, not broad cleanup.
acceptance_criteria: No unrelated behavior changes are introduced.

implementation_plan.summary: Reproduce, fix, and verify in short iterations for both frontend and backend quality-visibility failures.

steps.deliverable: Reproduce failing frontend/backend quality-visibility commands locally.
acceptance_criteria: Command output identifies concrete failure sources.

delivered: Captured frontend quality-visibility lint failures tied to strict ESLint rules in orchestrator policy and component tests.
Captured backend quality-visibility coverage instability under high parallel workers and identified worker-count throttling as mitigation.
verification_testing: verify: cd frontend && NPM_CONFIG_CACHE=/tmp/soundspan-frontend-npm-cache npm run lint
verify: cd backend && NPM_CONFIG_CACHE=/tmp/soundspan-backend-npm-cache npm run test:coverage -- --maxWorkers=2 src/services/__tests__/notificationPolicyService.test.ts

steps.deliverable: Apply minimal fixes for discovered frontend/backend failure roots.
acceptance_criteria: Previously failing commands pass after patching.

delivered: Patched workflow to isolate npm cache and cap backend coverage workers for better memory stability.
Fixed frontend lint-breaking patterns in orchestrator policy and component test files.
Updated OpenAPI coverage tooling to normalize regex route params and ignore Express router.all for implemented-route coverage matching.

steps.deliverable: Run final impacted checks and preflight.
acceptance_criteria: All targeted checks pass and preflight remains clean.

delivered: Regenerated and verified JSDoc and OpenAPI coverage artifacts at 100%.
Validated frontend quality path (lint + build) and backend targeted coverage path without full-suite rerun.
verification_testing: verify: cd frontend && NPM_CONFIG_CACHE=/tmp/soundspan-frontend-npm-cache npm run lint
verify: cd frontend && NPM_CONFIG_CACHE=/tmp/soundspan-frontend-npm-cache npm run build
verify: cd backend && NPM_CONFIG_CACHE=/tmp/soundspan-backend-npm-cache npm run test:coverage -- --maxWorkers=2 src/services/__tests__/notificationPolicyService.test.ts
